The question is asking to determine who the team played before the Montreal Alouettes on November 13. Since the "date" column contains strings that describe dates (month and day), we need to sort the data chronologically to see the order of games. We'll use the f_sort_column(date) operation with the order "small to large" (chronological) to arrange the games and find out who was played before the November 13 game against Montreal Alouettes.
The team played before the Montreal Alouettes on November 13. Looking at the table, the game before November 13 was on November 6 against the Toronto Argonauts.
